name: The New York Times
description: Produced The New York Times's new daily news podcast, The Headlines
Pitched, booked, interviewed, edited, scored, and mixed a one of three segments ever day
Planned coverage with Times correspondents and editors from around the world

name: Radiolab
description: Reported and produced an original story on the academic piracy website, Sci-Hub
Casted, pre-interviewed, interviewed, and cut tape for all new episodes
Helped produce a five-episode mini-series Mixtape, cutting over 100 hours of interview tape

name: The New Yorker
description: Produced the recently re-launched New Yorker politics podcast, The Political Scene
Pitch, prepped, and produced the DC Roundtable with Jane Mayer, Susan Glasser, and Evan Osnos

name: The Watson Fellowship
description: One-year grant for solo exploration outside of the US: reported from India, Myanmar, Nepal, and Spain
My project, Blurred Realities, examined the social and political consequences of a digitally networked world
